name: quality.arc42.org-site
description: Quality requirements and goals for software and system architectures
author: arc42

scripts.test:css: npm run test:css:format && npm run test:css:rules
scripts.test:ui: docker compose --profile test run --rm playwright npx playwright test --config _docker/playwright/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:headed: docker compose --profile test run --rm playwright xvfb-run -a npx playwright test --config _docker/playwright/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:ui:debug: docker compose --profile test run --rm -e PWDEBUG=1 playwright npx playwright test --config _docker/playwright/playwright.config.ts --debug
